en: One year of special assets: Is the spring of rolling excavators now coming? More debt for infrastructure and climate protection: Almost a year ago, the Union and the SPD, together with the Greens, changed the Basic Law and decided on a 500 billion debt package. Why is there so little evidence of this so far? By L. Kaufmann and N. Kohnert.
la: Unus annus specialium bonorum: Estne fons volvendi excavatores nunc venientes? Cur tam parum huius rei testimonium est? By L. Kaufmann and N. Kohnert.

en: Forest damage could double by the year 2100. Model calculations from the Technical University of Munich show that fires and pest infestations in Europe's forests could increase sharply by 2100. Depending on the rise in temperatures, forests like today might no longer exist. By Andreas Kegel.

de: Bald kein „Playa y Sol“ mehr?: Spanien verzeichnet die ersten Klimaflüchtlinge. In Andalusien verschlingen Wellen eine komplette Küstenpromenade. In Katalonien ist der Zugverkehr gefährdet. Und überall schwinden die Strände. Der Klimawandel am Mittelmeer lässt sich nur noch mit Milliardeninvestitionen stoppen.
en: Soon there will be no more “Playa y Sol”?: Spain records the first climate refugees. In Andalusia, waves engulf an entire coastal promenade. Train traffic is at risk in Catalonia. And beaches are disappearing everywhere. Climate change in the Mediterranean can only be stopped with investments worth billions.
la: Mox non ultra "Playa y Sol"?: Hispania primos fugitivos climatis commemorat. In Baetica, fluctus totum oram maritimam involvunt. Proverbium mercaturae in Catalonia in periculo est.
